zh.lifeSummary: William Foliot是William Foliot I和Gersende的兒子，出生在英國。他於1130年之前與Agnes d'Arques結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1166年之前。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Foliot是William Foliot I和Gersende的儿子，出生在英国。他于1130年之前与Agnes d'Arques结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1166年之前。

nameMeanings.name: Foliot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (Lombardy): variant of   Foglio  . This surname is very rare in Italy.

variants.name: Foglio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmine, Dino, Flavio, Julieta, Sal, Salvatore.
Italian: probably from the Latin personal name Folius (which is embodied in the common placename Fogliano).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Hastings
historicEvents.description: Battle of Hastings was fought between the Norman-French army and the battle-wary English army on October 14, 1066. Duke William of Normandy believed he was the rightful king rather than Harold, who had been crowned king several months earlier. Harold was killed in battle and William was crowned king on Christmas Day 1066.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: William Foliot was born in England as the son of William Foliot I and Gersende. He married Agnes d'Arques before 1130. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died before 1166.

fr.lifeSummary: William Foliot est né à Angleterre, fils de William Foliot I et Gersende. Il a épousé Agnes d'Arques avant 1130. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé avant 1166.

de.lifeSummary: William Foliot wurde in England, als Sohn von William Foliot I und Gersende geboren. Er hat vor 1130 Agnes d'Arques geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb vor 1166.

it.lifeSummary: William Foliot è nato il nel England come figlio di William Foliot I e Gersende. Lui sposato Agnes d'Arques prima del 1130. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì prima del 1166.

ja.lifeSummary: William FoliotはイギリスでWilliam Foliot IとGersendeの息子として生まれた。1130年以前にAgnes d'Arquesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1166年以前に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Foliot(은)는 영국에서 William Foliot I(와)과 Gersende의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1130년 이전 Agnes d'Arques(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1166년 이전 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Foliot nasceu em Inglaterra filho de William Foliot I e Gersende. Ele casou-se com Agnes d'Arques antes 1130. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu antes 1166.

ru.lifeSummary: William Foliot родился в местности Англия. Его родителей звали William Foliot I и Gersende. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes d'Arques перед 1130 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер перед 1166 г.

es.lifeSummary: William Foliot nació en Inglaterra como hijo de William Foliot I y Gersende. Se casó con Agnes d'Arques antes de 1130. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió antes de 1166.
